name: Bima Pratama
tagline: Crafting calm interfaces, one component at a time.
bio: Solo indie developer building micro-SaaS in the quiet hours. I like motion, type, and the kind of details you only notice on the third visit.

projects.title: Lumen Notes
projects.description: A Markdown-first writing app with AI outline suggestions and offline-first sync.

projects.title: Drift
projects.description: A 1MB Pomodoro timer that lives in your menu bar. No account. No telemetry.

projects.title: Prompt Atlas
projects.description: An open library of reproducible LLM prompts with side-by-side eval results.

projects.title: Otto
projects.description: A tiny CLI that watches your git diffs and writes conventional commits for you.
